reviews.comment:
Baños super limpios... Trato amable... Pero apaguen las luces de dia quw estan al pedo por fa! Y son un monton!

(Translated by Google)
Super clean bathrooms... Friendly service... But please turn off the lights during the day, they're useless! And there are a lot of them!

reviews.comment:
Al día de hoy, 4/10/2021, están abiertos los surtidores y el GNC,  no así el ACÁ ni el autoservicio. Muy buenos precios y atención

(Translated by Google)
As of today, October 4, 2021, the gas pumps and CNG station are open, but the ACA (a gas station) and the self-service area are not. Very good prices and service.

reviews.comment:
Excelentes precios en GNC . Incomparable el remodelamiento. Lástima que ya no paso por allí. Mí bolsillo la extraña...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent prices on CNG. The renovation is unbeatable. It's a shame I don't go there anymore. My wallet misses it...
